hero.title: Turan Hidayatov
hero.subtitle: Full-Stack Web Developer
hero.description: A full-stack developer specialized in PHP, Laravel, and MySQL with expertise in RESTful APIs, MVC architecture, and backend development.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: I'm Turan Hidayatov, a full-stack web developer with expertise in PHP and Laravel backend development, RESTful APIs, MySQL/PostgreSQL, and MVC architecture. I have worked on diverse projects including courier, logistics, warehouse management, and government portal platforms.

why-need-website.title: Why Your Business Needs a Professional Website
why-need-website.description: From simple showcase sites to complex systems — why your business needs an online presence
why-need-website.body_title: Why Your Business Needs a Professional Website
why-need-website.paragraph1: Did you know that 75% of users judge a company's credibility based on its website? In today's digital world, potential clients first search for you online. A professional website is no longer a luxury — it's a necessity. Whether you need a simple business card site or a complex e-commerce platform, having an online presence is your business's future.
why-need-website.why_title: What You Lose Without a Website?
why-need-website.why_desc: Key benefits of having a professional website:
features: 24/7 availability — customers can find you anytime, even outside business hours
Trust and credibility — a professional site shows you're serious about your business
Competitive advantage — stay ahead of competitors who lack an online presence
Marketing hub — a central place for all your marketing campaigns
Customer insights — analyze visitor behavior and improve your strategy
why-need-website.start_title: From Simple Sites to Complex Systems
why-need-website.start_desc: Your website can take many forms depending on your business needs. Here are some examples:
why-need-website.code:
✓ Business card site — simple, informative pages showcasing your business
✓ E-commerce platform — online sales, order management, payment processing
✓ Admin panel — content, user, and data management
✓ CRM system — customer relationship management
✓ API integration — connect with third-party services (payment, email, SMS)
✓ Custom dashboard — interactive reports and analytics panels
why-need-website.conclusion_desc: Without an online presence, your business is invisible. Whether it's a simple landing page or a fully functional online platform — if you don't have a professional website, potential customers won't find you. Take action now and establish your business in the digital world!

planning-website-project.title: 5 Things to Know Before Starting a Website Project
planning-website-project.description: 5 essential steps to plan your website project for success
planning-website-project.body_title: 5 Things to Know Before Starting a Website Project
planning-website-project.paragraph1: Building a website is an exciting process, but without proper planning, projects often fail to deliver expected results. Whether it's a simple portfolio site or a complex online platform — the key to success is proper planning.
planning-website-project.why_desc: Good planning is the foundation of a successful project:
features: Clear goals — know exactly why you need the website
Target audience — understand who you're serving
Functionality — determine which features are essential
Budget and timeline — set realistic expectations
Future scalability — ensure your site can grow with you
planning-website-project.start_desc: Ask yourself these questions before starting your project:
planning-website-project.code:
1. Purpose: what problem will your website solve?
2. Audience: who are your target customers?
3. Content: what information will you present?
4. Features: what technical capabilities do you need?
5. Budget: how much are you ready to invest?
planning-website-project.conclusion_desc: A successful website starts with good planning. Clearly defining your goals, audience, and requirements ensures your project is completed on time and within budget. Remember: a well-planned project is already half done!

successful-website-features.title: 5 Essential Features of a Successful Website
successful-website-features.description: Discover the secrets of websites that attract customers and boost sales
successful-website-features.body_title: 5 Essential Features of a Successful Website
successful-website-features.paragraph1: A successful website isn't just about looking good — it needs to convert visitors into customers. In this post, we'll explain 5 essential features every professional website must have to deliver maximum results.
successful-website-features.why_desc: The 5 essential features of a successful website:
features: Fast loading — 53% of users leave if a site takes over 3 seconds to load
Mobile responsiveness — 60% of web traffic comes from mobile devices
User-friendly design — intuitive navigation and clear structure
SEO optimization — rank higher on Google search results
Strong Call-to-Action — buttons that drive visitors to take action
successful-website-features.start_desc: Apply these features to your website:
successful-website-features.code:
✓ Speed: optimize images, remove unnecessary plugins
✓ Mobile: use responsive design
✓ Design: keep it clean and simple
✓ SEO: choose right keywords, write meta descriptions
✓ CTA: at least one call-to-action on every page
successful-website-features.conclusion_desc: A successful website is more than just good design — it must be functional and user-friendly. With speed, mobile optimization, SEO, and strong CTAs, you can make your website truly engaging. A professional website multiplies your return on investment!
